channel.title: Jag Patel — Blog
channel.description: AI/ML engineering, MLOps, cloud architecture, and platform insights.

item.title: Building a Local AI Billing Chat with FastAPI and Ollama
item.description: I built a local AI-powered billing chat that reads cloud cost CSVs (AWS, Azure) and lets you query cost changes, new services, and team breakdowns in plain language — no external APIs, fully on-device with Ollama and FastAPI.

item.title: Building a Local MCP Server to Automate Daily DevOps Tasks
item.description: I built a fully local MCP (Model Context Protocol) server using FastAPI and Phi-3 Mini to automate repetitive cloud and DevOps tasks — no cloud, no API keys, entirely on-device.

item.title: 🚀 A language-agnostic API & AI/ML E2E testing framework
item.description: Building a plug-and-play reliability engine for modern API and AI/ML systems.
